_note: D.2 (special-locations sprint) — first lighting-layout example to fire INV-12 end-to-end. mode=full_drawing AND room.room_type=bathroom (∈ Part-7 set) triggers the lighting-layout-ir.schema.json third allOf clause, requiring consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning. INV-11 fires (Wave-1 photometric cascade) AND INV-12 fires (Wave-1 special-locations cascade). All 12 INVs PASS with concrete evidence. Cascade producers: electrical/special-locations/examples/cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom (C.2 deliverable) and electrical/photometric-analysis/examples/cascade-uk-bathroom-zone-1-zone-2 (Part-7 retrofit deliverable — replaces the D.2 synthetic helper).

assumptions: UF = 0.60 from CIBSE SLL standard reflectance table for low-RI small bathroom (RI=0.79, reflectances 0.5/0.5/0.2 — light tiled walls + ceiling)
MF = 0.80 for clean domestic bathroom on a 3-year cleaning cycle (CIBSE TM 3-25)
Photometric cascade resolved from electrical/photometric-analysis/examples/cascade-uk-bathroom-zone-1-zone-2 (Part-7 retrofit) — replaces the D.2 synthetic helper

drawing_notes: All luminaires: 95mm IPx4 LED recessed downlight, 1500 lm, 13W, 3000K, CRI ≥ 90
Maintained illuminance: 200 lux task plane per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x (washrooms/bathrooms)
Special locations: bathroom per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701 — see consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning for the 5 zones (bath_1_z0, bath_1_z1, shower_1_z1, bath_1_z2, shower_1_z2)
Lighting circuit C-L01 protected by 30 mA RCD per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.411.3.3 (RCD blanket-by-room)
L01 sits within bath_1_z2 (interior of Zone 2 polygon, height 2250 mm at zone height ceiling) — IPx4 verified, 230 V permitted
L02 sits within bath_1_z1 over the bath (X 500–2200, Y 0–700, height 550–2250) — IPx4 verified, 230 V Class 2 permitted with 30 mA RCD
Switch SW01 placed at (2550, 1900, 1200 mm AFF) — outside all §701 zones (north of Zone 2 y=1300 boundary), latch-side adjacent to north entrance
Shaver socket SS01 at (50, 1900, 1400 mm AFF) — outside all §701 zones; isolating transformer to BS EN 61558-2-5
Ceiling height 2250 mm matches the §701 Zone 1 vertical ceiling — luminaires sit at the upper boundary, inclusive per §701 zone-table convention

selection_source.citation: CIBSE LG7 §6.4 (IPx4 downlight UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories) + BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.512.2 (IPx4 floor in Zone 1)

rationale.chat_summary: 2 × IPx4 1500 lm downlights for a 2700×2100 mm UK bathroom. Target 200 lx (BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.x) achieved 254 lx (UF=0.60, MF=0.80). Single 6 A Type B MCB on DB L1; 30 mA RCD per §701.411.3.3. Cascade: special-locations payload places L01 in Zone 2 and L02 in bath Zone 1 — both IPx4 verified. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add ceiling-mounted extract fan' or 'split into 2 circuits'.

sections.title: Illumination
sections.summary: Target 200 lx (bathroom, BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x); achieved 254 lx maintained.

decisions.label: Lux target 200 lx maintained
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x entry for bathroom/washroom sets 200 lx general illuminance.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.x entry for bathroom

decisions.label: UGR ≤ 19 verified by photometric cascade
decisions.summary: Lumen method cannot compute UGR; photometric-analysis cascade returns UGR_max=18.2 ≤ 19 limit (BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.36 bathroom_domestic).

sections.title: Layout
sections.summary: 2 IPx4 downlights on the 1350 mm centreline — L01 over the open floor (in Zone 2) and L02 directly over the bath (in bath Zone 1).

decisions.label: N = 2 downlights at 1500 lm satisfies 200 lx target

sections.title: Special-locations cascade
sections.summary: Bathroom triggers BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701 zoning. 5 zones consumed from cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom; both luminaires fall inside §701 zones at the 2250 mm ceiling; both IPx4 — verified by INV-12 sub-check 3.

decisions.label: L02 directly over the bath: IPx4 satisfies §701.512.2 Zone 1 floor
decisions.summary: L02 at (1350, 350, 2250) sits within bath_1_z1 polygon (X 500–2200, Y 0–700, height 550–2250). §701.512.2 sets IPx4 minimum in Zone 1; LED_DOWNLIGHT_IPX4 ip_rating=IPx4 PASS. §701.411.3.3 30 mA RCD blanket cascaded onto C-L01.

decisions.label: L01 in Zone 2 ceiling extension: IPx4 satisfies §701.512.2
decisions.summary: L01 at (1350, 1050, 2250) sits within bath_1_z2 polygon (X -100..2800, Y -600..1300, height 0–2250). §701.512.2 sets IPx4 minimum in Zone 2; LED_DOWNLIGHT_IPX4 ip_rating=IPx4 PASS. No socket prohibited because L01 is a luminaire not a 230 V socket.

sections.title: Switching
sections.summary: Single 1-gang switch on east wall north of Zone 2 boundary, latch-side of north entrance.

decisions.label: Switch at (2550, 1900) outside all §701 zones
decisions.summary: Switch sits OUTSIDE the Zone 2 polygon (y=1900 > zone y_max=1300) — §701.512.3 socket-distance rule does not apply to lighting switches but switch placement still respects engineer's practice of locating switches outside the splash zone.
decisions.rule: Switch outside Zone 2; latch-side of entrance

sections.title: Shaver socket
sections.summary: Shaver socket at (50, 1900, 1400 mm AFF) — outside all §701 zones; isolation per BS EN 61558-2-5.

decisions.label: Shaver socket outside Zone 2 with BS EN 61558-2-5 isolation
decisions.summary: SS01 at y=1900 > zone y_max=1300 — outside Zone 2 polygon. Shaver socket itself is a permitted fixture per §701.512.3 when supplied via BS EN 61558-2-5 isolating transformer.

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: Single 6 A Type B MCB on DB L1; load 26 W well within 80 % continuous-load envelope of 6 A × 230 V × 0.8 = 1104 W; 30 mA RCD per §701.411.3.3 cascaded from the special-locations payload constraint.

decisions.label: 6 A Type B MCB on DB L1 with 30 mA RCD
decisions.summary: 2 × 13 W = 26 W. 30 mA RCD required by §701.411.3.3 blanket-by-room constraint cascaded from special_locations_zoning.electrical_constraints[0] (rcd_blanket_by_room, 30 mA, applies_to_circuit_types includes 'lighting').

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Two design assumptions — confirm against the luminaire photometric datasheet + tile reflectance survey before issue.

decisions.label: UF = 0.60
decisions.summary: From CIBSE SLL standard reflectance table 0.5/0.5/0.2 for a low-RI tiled bathroom (RI=0.79).

decisions.label: MF = 0.80
decisions.summary: Clean domestic bathroom on a 3-year cleaning cycle.
decisions.rule: CIBSE TM 3-25 / standard MF for clean domestic LED

invariants.evidence: Lumen method: N=2 luminaires × 1500 lm × UF=0.60 × MF=0.80 / 5.67 m² = achieved_illuminance_lux=254 lux ≥ target 200 lux (Rule 1 PASS). Per [spacing-rules#lumen-method-formula] + ontology LED_DOWNLIGHT_IPX4 UF table at RI=0.79, reflectances 0.5/0.5/0.2.

S/H ratio: Hm=2250-750=1500 mm, SHR_max=1.5 (LED_DOWNLIGHT_IPX4 ontology default for medium-distribution downlight), limit=2250 mm. With N=2 on the 1350 mm centreline: S_y between luminaires = 1050-350 = 700 mm ≤ 2250 PASS; edge clearances 350 mm (S edge to L02) and 1050 mm (L01 to N edge) within S/2 envelope. Per [spacing-rules#shr-max-default].

Switch coverage: 1 entrance declared (north wall x=2400), 1 switch emitted (SW01 at (2550, 1900), 1200 mm AFF, latch_side per door_swing=inward_right). switches.length >= entrances.length (Rule 3a PASS). 150 mm from entrance centreline + 200 mm setback from north wall — within reach. Height + latch placement per [switching-rules#height] + [switching-rules#latch-side] (Rule 3b PASS).

Circuit topology: both L01 (y=1050) and L02 (y=350) on circuit C-L01 span row_index 0 (single 2-luminaire circuit, no Z-pattern possible — |delta|=0 ≤ 1). homerun_endpoint=(2700, 1900, E) sits on east wall (Rule 4b PASS). circuits[0].row_index=0 declared explicitly; reviewer prompt INV-4 sub-check (a) PASS.
Circuit load: total_load_w=26 W ≤ 0.8 × 6 × 230 = 1104 W (6 A MCB, per circuits[0].mcb_rating_a). Rule 5 PASS per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.1 + IET OSG App A 80% continuous-load rule.

Part L compliance: inputs.new_build=true gates the check. lamp_efficacy_lm_per_w=115.4 ≥ part_l_efficacy_target_lm_per_w=65 (Building Regs Part L 2021 Domestic compliance route — Approved Document L Vol 1, lighting efficacy floor for new dwellings). controls.part_l_assessed=true, controls.part_l_compliant=true. Rule 6 PASS.

Zone assignment: 2 luminaires both in Z2 (interior). Glazed walls = [] -> no perimeter zone needed (consistency PASS per [switching-rules#perimeter-circuit]). No task or emergency zones declared (small domestic bathroom outside the BS 5266-1 emergency lighting scope). Rule 7 PASS per [control-rules#part-l-daylight].

selection_source.photometric_source='ontology_default'; citation='CIBSE LG7 §6.4 (IPx4 downlight UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories) + BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.512.2 (IPx4 floor in Zone 1)'. No inputs.photometric_override supplied for this example. Rule 8 PASS.

drafting_furniture present with all 4 required blocks (title_block + scale_bar + dimensions[2] + luminaire_schedule). All annotations declare font_family='Arial' + explicit font_size_pt ∈ {8, 10}. No {{placeholder}} remnants in any text field. Rule 9 PASS.

Schema validation PASSED against shared/schemas/electrical/lighting-layout-ir.schema.json. All top-level required fields populated: drawing_type, version, room, calculation_summary, rationale, invariants, plus full_drawing-mode required: luminaire_type, luminaires, switches, circuits, controls, drawing_notes, zones, drafting_furniture, selection_source, consumed_intents. The 3rd allOf clause (room.room_type='bathroom' ∈ Part-7 set) is satisfied — consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning is present. non_compliance_flags = [] (vacuously valid). Rule 10 PASS.

Photometric cascade resolved: consumed_intents.photometric_grid sourced from electrical/photometric-analysis/examples/cascade-uk-bathroom-zone-1-zone-2/intent-out.json (Part-7 retrofit deliverable — replaces the D.2 synthetic helper) (sub-check 1 PASS). payload.task_area_compliant=true (sub-check 2 PASS). achieved_avg_illuminance_lux=254 vs target=200 (sub-check 3 PASS — photometric matches IR's 254 lx); UGR_max=18.2 ≤ UGR_target=19 satisfies BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.36 bathroom_domestic; uniformity U0=0.66 ≥ target 0.4 PASS. 0 non_compliance_flags cascaded to lighting-layout calculation_summary with _cascaded_from=photometric-analysis attribution (sub-check 4 PASS, vacuously). Cascade per skill.manifest.json consumes_intents trigger 'mode == full_drawing'.

Special-locations cascade resolved from electrical/special-locations/examples/cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom/intent-out.json. Sub-check 1 PASS: consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning present. Sub-check 2 PASS: payload.compliant=true; zone_count=5; violation_count_critical=0; violation_count_high=0. Sub-check 3 PASS: L01 at (1350, 1050, 2250) hits bath_1_z2 polygon (X -100..2800, Y -600..1300, h 0–2250 incl); ip_rating_min=IPx4 matched IPx4 PASS; max_voltage_v=230 ≥ 230 V PASS; luminaire ∉ prohibited [socket_230v] PASS. L02 at (1350, 350, 2250) hits bath_1_z1 polygon (X 500..2200, Y 0..700, h 550..2250 incl); ip_rating_min=IPx4 matched IPx4 PASS; max_voltage_v=230 ≥ 230 V PASS; luminaire ∉ prohibited [socket_230v, switch_230v, luminaire_non_ip_rated] (IPx4 is rated) PASS. Sub-check 4 PASS: payload.non_compliance_flags=[] empty, vacuously nothing to cascade. Per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.512.2 + §701.411.3.3 + cluster roadmap §6.7.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 is the interior volume of the bath basin per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table convention. SELV-only equipment permitted; no socket/switch/non-SELV fixtures permitted.
Zone 1 is the vertical projection above the bath polygon to 2250mm AFF per §701 zone-table convention. Overlaps shower_1 zone_1 polygon.
Zone 1 from shower_1 head at 2100mm AFF: zone extends vertically from floor to shower-head height per §701 zone-table.
Zone 2 = 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1 polygon per §701 zone-table convention. Socket outlets prohibited within 3m of Zone 1.
Zone 2 from shower_1: 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1; vertical ceiling tied to shower head at 2100mm AFF per §701.

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD protection required for all low-voltage circuits serving locations containing a bath or shower per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3.
